article.title: New York Bans Government Employees from Insider Trading on Prediction Markets
article.summary: A new executive order seen by WIRED prohibits New York state employees from using insider knowledge to enrich themselves with prediction market bets.
article.title_zh: 紐約州禁止政府員工在預測市場上內幕交易
article.summary_zh: WIRED 獲得的新行政命令禁止紐約州員工使用內幕知識進行預測市場投注以牟利。

article.title: Lawsuit: Nintendo is getting tariff refunds—its customers should get them instead
article.summary: Two gamers who want tariff refunds sued Nintendo of America yesterday, alleging that the company intends to pocket refunds received from the government instead of giving money back to consumers who paid higher prices. The class action complaint seeks to represent a class including the two named plaintiffs and all other US residents who bought Nintendo products from February 2025 to February 2026. "Unless restrained by this Court, Nintendo stands to recover the same tariff payments twice—once from consumers through higher prices and again from the federal government through tariff refunds, including interest paid by the government on those funds," said the lawsuit filed in US District Court for the Western District of Washington. "Nintendo has made no legally binding commitment to return ta
article.title_zh: 訴訟：Nintendo 獲得關稅退款—應該退給消費者
article.summary_zh: 兩名遊戲玩家昨日控告 Nintendo of America，聲稱該公司意圖保留政府關稅退款而非返還給支付高價的消費者。

article.title: Lyft to Buy Gett’s UK Taxi Business, Marking Its Third International Acquisition
article.summary: Lyft Inc. has agreed to buy London black cab app Gett, its third acquisition in the past year, as the company works to expand its presence beyond the US.
article.title_zh: Lyft 收購 Gett 英國計程車業務，標誌其第三次國際併購
article.summary_zh: Lyft Inc. 已同意收購倫敦黑色計程車應用程式 Gett，這是公司過去一年的第三次併購，旨在擴展美國以外的業務。

article.title: AI agent designs a complete RISC-V CPU from a 219-word spec sheet in just 12 hours — comparably simple design required 'many tens of billions of tokens'
article.summary: AI chip design startup Verkor.io claims that its agentic AI system, Design Conductor, has autonomously produced a complete RISC-V CPU core.
article.title_zh: AI 代理在 12 小時內根據 219 個單詞的規格表設計完整的 RISC-V CPU — 可比較簡單的設計需要「數百億個 tokens」
article.summary_zh: AI 晶片設計新創公司 Verkor.io 聲稱其代理 AI 系統 Design Conductor 已自動生成完整的 RISC-V CPU 核心。

article.title: Report: Meta will train AI agents by tracking employees' mouse, keyboard use
article.summary: Meta will begin tracking the mouse movements, clicks, and keystrokes of its US employees to generate high-quality training data for future AI agents, Reuters reports . The news organization cites internal memos posted by the Meta Superintelligence Labs team in reporting on the new Model Capability Initiative employee-tracking software. That software will operate on specific work-related apps and websites and also make use of periodic screenshots to provide context for the AI training, according to the memo. "This is where all Meta employees can help our models get better simply by doing their daily work," the memo reads, in part, Reuters reports. Read full article Comments
article.title_zh: 報告：Meta將透過追蹤員工的滑鼠和鍵盤使用情況來訓練AI代理
article.summary_zh: 據路透社報導，Meta將開始追蹤其美國員工的滑鼠移動、點擊和按鍵操作，以生成用於未來AI代理的高品質訓練數據。Meta Superintelligence Labs團隊發佈的內部備忘錄報導了這一新的Model Capability Initiative。

article.title: Framework’s overhauled Laptop 13 Pro brings a redesigned chassis — Intel Core Ultra Series 3 system aims to be a 'MacBook Pro for Linux users'
article.summary: The Framework Laptop 13 Pro is the company's first redesign of its chassis, with CNC aluminum, a haptic touchpad, larger battery, and an option for pre-loaded Ubuntu.
article.title_zh: Framework 重新設計的 Laptop 13 Pro 搭載 Intel Core Ultra Series 3——瞄準成為『Linux 用戶的 MacBook Pro』
article.summary_zh: Framework Laptop 13 Pro 是該公司首次重新設計機殼，採用 CNC 鋁合金、觸覺觸控板、更大電池，並提供預裝 Ubuntu 選項。

article.title: AI research lab NeoCognition lands $40M seed to build agents that learn like humans
article.summary: Founded by an OSU researcher, the startup is developing AI agents that can become experts in any domain.
article.title_zh: AI 研究實驗室 NeoCognition 獲得 4000 萬美元種子輪融資，開發像人類一樣學習的智能代理
article.summary_zh: 由俄亥俄州立大學研究人員創辦的初創公司正在開發能在任何領域成為專家的 AI 代理。

article.title: Bond, a new social media platform, wants to use AI to help you kick your doomscrolling habit
article.summary: Bond wants you to get off the couch and get back into the real world, its creator says. The new platform's AI system is designed to motivate users to do things away from the app.
article.title_zh: 新社交媒體平台 Bond 想用 AI 幫助您戒除無限滾動的習慣
article.summary_zh: Bond 的創造者表示，該平台想讓用戶遠離沙發，回到現實世界，其 AI 系統旨在激勵用戶進行應用程式外的活動。

article.title: Google unveils two new TPUs designed for the "agentic era"
article.summary: Most of the companies that have fully committed to building AI models are gobbling up every Nvidia AI accelerator they can get, but Google has taken a different approach. Most of its cloud AI infrastructure is based on its line of custom Tensor processing units (TPUs). After announcing the seventh-gen Ironwood TPU in 2025, the company has moved on to the eighth-gen version , but it's not just a faster iteration of the same chip. The new TPUs come in two flavors, providing Google and its customers with an AI platform that is faster and more efficient, the company says. Google is pushing the idea that the "agent era" is fundamentally different from the AI systems that came before, necessitating a new approach to the hardware. So engineers have devised the TPU8t (for training) and the TPU 8i
article.title_zh: Google 推出為「智能代理時代」設計的兩款新 TPU
article.summary_zh: Google 採用自主開發的 Tensor 處理器 TPU 作為雲端 AI 基礎設施，推出第七代 TPU 以適應智能代理時代。

article.title: Google Wallet rolling out big homepage, search redesign
article.summary: Google Wallet is beginning to widely roll out a big redesign of the app on Android that upgrades the passes experience. more…
article.title_zh: Google Wallet 推出大型首頁和搜尋重新設計
article.summary_zh: Google Wallet 開始在 Android 上廣泛推出應用的大型重新設計，升級通行證體驗。

article.title: 企業導入 AI 代理門檻高？Google 推一站式開發平台
article.summary: 「AI 代理」成為矽谷科技巨頭當今的核心戰場。Google 今天發布為企業實現 AI 代理所打造的開發平台，提 […]
article.title_zh: 企業導入 AI 代理門檻高？Google 推一站式開發平台
article.summary_zh: 「AI 代理」成為矽谷科技巨頭當今的核心戰場。Google 今天發布為企業實現 AI 代理所打造的開發平台，提 […]

article.title: OpenAI updates ChatGPT with Codex-powered ‘workspace agents’ for teams
article.summary: OpenAI launch week continues today with the introduction of workspace agents in ChatGPT. more…
article.title_zh: OpenAI 推出由 Codex 驅動的 ChatGPT 「workspace agents」供團隊使用
article.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出 ChatGPT 中的 workspace agents 功能，為團隊協作提供支援。

article.title: Honor launches its latest earphones globally
article.summary: During an event in Malaysia, Honor launched a slew of earphones globally. Most models aren't new. Some were announced in late 2025, but now, they are made available globally. The launch was garnished with prices for the local Malaysian market, too. The most recent pair, the Honor Earbuds 4, is priced at MYR 399 ($100) and is seemingly a great all-arounder with 48 hours of battery life, more than decent ANC rated at 50dB and dual titanium-coated drivers. You can check out our unboxing and hands-on article while you wait for the full review. The Honor Choice Earbuds Clip 2 Pro...
article.summary_zh: Honor在馬來西亞活動期間推出多款耳機,部分為2025年晚期推出的型號,現已全球上市,包括最新推出的Honor Earbuds 4。
